scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "bun run --cwd apps/api dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/api test && bun run --cwd apps/web test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
